name: Arkham Asylum RPG
description:
Welcome to Arkham Asylum

Arkham Asylum, A place to keep the Ill and dangerous away from society. Unfortunately, It was known to be easy to bribe the guards for an escape. Most patients were left to die from neglect of the staff. Arkham city was courupted in everyway possible. News broke, batman hasnt been seen for a few weeks. Ironically it kept the criminal masterminds behind closed doors because of it. Other news had spread of the attack Bruce Wayne had did on vicki Vale. Unseen to everyone he was under mad hatters hypnosis

My apologise if some of this bot isn't to Batman Lore. I'm not the greatest at story telling and I'm not a huge batman comic fan, Ive only played 2 of the Xbox360 games and watched the movies loll.
creator: Lxcafont
